description: Source of truth for published ACES scenario-pack schemas: ids, versions, status, source/ownership notes, compatibility impact, and fixture links. All schemas are JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 and implement contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md; they do not redefine ACES SDL semantics.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Pack Metadata (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md 'Minimum Pack Shape'. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns pack identity/metadata. ACES core owns SDL semantics; this schema references but never redefines SDL.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Compatibility (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md 'Compatibility Boundaries'. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns the pack's declared ACES/pack-version compatibility. Downstream deployment matrices are explicitly out of scope.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Provenance (v1)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md, docs/provenance-ledger-design-guardrails.md, and the incumbent four-part provenance ledger (Brad-Edwards/aces-scenario-packs#19, #21). No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns the four-part provenance ledger: sources, per-artifact distribution class, content-safety attestation, and publication review. Records references only; never copies private content or credentials. Distribution class is separate from runtime visibility.
schemas.compatibility_impact: Breaking replacement of provenance v0 (contract-v1 convergence, #19): the collapsed sources+scrubStatus+ownership shape is superseded by the four-part ledger. Pre-1.0 (0.y across the repo); no cross-version compatibility promise. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Artifact Boundary (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from docs/authoring-boundary.md and docs/decisions/adrs/0001-scenario-pack-contract-boundary.md. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns pack artifact dispositions. Does not move capture/inventory workflow assets before the ownership issue (#14) resolves.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Runtime Visibility (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md 'Runtime Visibility' and docs/runtime-visibility-design-guardrails.md. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns the runtime-visibility axis (who may see an artifact root at runtime). Orthogonal to artifact-boundary disposition; does not redefine SDL semantics or downstream delivery behavior.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Runtime Profile (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md terminology. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns portable, ACES-native runtime expectations. No private infrastructure or product-specific execution behavior.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Delivery Bundle (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from the contract's 'Delivery and Audience Bundle' optional layer. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns audience/packaging in portable terms. Does not define downstream portal, class-management, scoreboard, or release-channel behavior.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Lifecycle (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from contracts/scenario-pack-contract.md 'Lifecycle States'. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns pack maturity state. States are the contract's ACES-native set; downstream catalog workflow statuses are excluded by construction.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Validation (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from docs/schema-design-guardrails.md 'Cross-Cutting Gates'. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns pack validation evidence. Validation tooling itself is deferred to #5; this schema records evidence only.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.

schemas.title: ACES Scenario Pack — Release Metadata (v0)
schemas.source: Authored in this repository from docs/versioning.md. No upstream schema ported.
schemas.ownership: aces-scenario-packs owns pack release metadata (release version, published schema versions, compatibility impact, migration notes). Release tooling is deferred to #5.
schemas.compatibility_impact: New pre-1.0 schema; additive. No prior published version. Future changes follow docs/versioning.md.
